title: Fsang18 Heros and Arrzee's Multiverse Compat
description: a datapack that makes the fabric from arrzee's multiverse and Fsang18 Heros craft able again
body:
Fsang18 Heros and Arrzee's Multiverse Compat

This datapack adds recipe compatibility between Arrzee's Multiverse Addon and Fsang18's Heroes Addon, focusing on fabric materials used in both. this datapack resolves the issue with the fabrics not being craftabled anymore

Features:

Cross-compatible fabric crafting

No more recipe conflicts between the two addons

Great for modpacks that include both addons

Just drop it into your world’s datapacks folder and you’re ready to go!
